scripts.dev:composition: yarn build:userland && yarn build:desktop-runtime && yarn build:desktop-runtime-resources && yarn dev:desktop
scripts.install:all: yarn install && yarn workspaces foreach run install
scripts.test: yarn workspace @artgod/backend test && yarn workspace @artgod/frontend test && yarn workspace @artgod/indexer test && yarn workspace @artgod/trading test
scripts.test:desktop:runtime-packaging: node ./scripts/build/runtime-build-profile.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/native-runtime-dependencies.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/build-sqlite-native-binding.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/desktop-runtime-dependency-staging.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/verify-staged-desktop-runtime-dependencies.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/verify-linux-bundled-runtime.test.mjs
scripts.test:desktop:release-inputs: yarn test:desktop:runtime-packaging && node ./scripts/build/tauri-webview-capabilities.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/secret-prompt-release-inputs.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/prepare-tauri-linux-bundler-tools.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/sync-version.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/desktop-release-admission.test.mjs && node ./scripts/build/github-release-publication.test.mjs
scripts.test:desktop:sensitive-process: yarn build:desktop-sidecars --profile release && node ./scripts/build/node-sensitive-process.test.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/crates/artgod-sensitive-process/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/sidecars/artgod-secret-prompt/Cargo.toml --locked && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked runtime::supervisor::tests::trading_bot_node_args_disable_signal_started_inspection_exactly_once --lib -- --exact && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked runtime::supervisor::tests::key_bearing_bot_environment_is_rebuilt_from_frozen_config --lib -- --exact
scripts.test:desktop:secret-prompt-parent-contai: cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked --offline wallet::infra::prompt::secret_prompt_sidecar::tests --lib && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked --offline wallet::infra::prompt::secret_prompt_sidecar::tests::export_reveal_fixture_never_survives_hard_parent_death --lib -- --ignored --exact && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/sidecars/artgod-secret-prompt/Cargo.toml --locked --offline
scripts.test:desktop:parent-containment: yarn test:desktop:secret-prompt-parent-containment && yarn workspace @artgod/trading test src/runtime/parent-secret-channel.test.ts && yarn build:desktop-runtime && node ./scripts/build/prepare-desktop-runtime-dependencies.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml runtime::supervisor::tests::key_bearing_bot_environment_is_rebuilt_from_frozen_config --lib -- --exact && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml runtime::supervisor::tests::stop_interrupts_a_secret_handoff_blocked_by_an_unread_pipe --lib -- --exact && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/crates/artgod-sensitive-process/Cargo.toml tests::hard_parent_death::hard_parent_death_stops_child_pid_and_activity -- --ignored --exact && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml runtime::supervisor::tests::production_bot_exits_gracefully_and_after_hard_parent_death --lib -- --ignored --exact
